title: DMR Performance, History & Market
description: Repo-backed Kibana dashboard for Danish passenger-car performance, registration history, inspections, leasing, and rarity in dmr-raw-000002.

data_source.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL power_kw = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | STATS avg_power_kw = AVG(power_kw) | LIMIT 1

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL power_kw = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | STATS p90_power_kw = PERCENTILE(power_kw, 90), p99_power_kw = PERCENTILE(power_kw, 99) | LIMIT 1

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL gross_weight_kg = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTotalVaegt >= 300 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTotalVaegt <= 10000, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTotalVaegt, null) | STATS avg_gross_weight_kg = AVG(gross_weight_kg) | LIMIT 1

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), leased_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL, inspection_records = COUNT(*) WHERE SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword IS NOT NULL | EVAL leased_share = 1.0 * leased_cars / total_cars | LIMIT 1

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL power_kw = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | WHERE power_kw IS NOT NULL | INLINE STATS fleet_avg_kw = AVG(power_kw) | STATS brand_avg_kw = AVG(power_kw), fleet_avg_kw = MAX(fleet_avg_kw), car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE brand IS NOT NULL AND car_count >= 100 AND brand_avg_kw > fleet_avg_kw | SORT brand_avg_kw DESC | LIMIT 15

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL power_kw = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | WHERE power_kw IS NOT NULL | EVAL power_tier = CASE(power_kw < 60, "Economy", power_kw < 120, "Family", power_kw < 200, "Executive", power_kw <= 400, "Performance", "Exotic") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY power_tier | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10

config.title: EV Adoption by First Registration Year

data_source.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 2000 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), electric_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El" BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | EVAL ev_share = 1.0 * electric_cars / total_cars | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 40

config.title: CO2 Trend by First Registration Year

data_source.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 2000 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer IS NOT NULL AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 1000 | STATS avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(_co2_g_per_km_primaer), p50_co2_g_per_km = PERCENTILE(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 50) BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 40

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY inspection_result = SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), leased_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL BY primary_fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | EVAL leased_share = 1.0 * leased_cars / total_cars | SORT leased_cars DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE brand IS NOT NULL AND car_count <= 50 | SORT car_count ASC | LIMIT 25
